programme.desc: 'S9/E5 - Climbing'. Nina receives help from Felix, her touch neuron, when she investigates how to get better at climbing.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Murder And The Sex Cam Model'. Margaret and Chad Amato are found dead with their youngest son in their Florida Home, middle son Grant Amato is accused of killing his family, despite a seeming lack of evidence.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lewis And Machuca'. In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Brileys'. Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Ian McLoughlin'. A man is stabbed while helping a neighbour who's being burgled, and he tragically bleeds to death. The killer is murderer Ian McLoughlin, out on day release from prison.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
programme.desc: 'Murder In The Outback: The Falconio And Lees Mystery. S1/E1'. Andrew Fraser, formerly one of Australia's foremost criminal defence lawyers, begins the reinvestigation into the Peter Falconio story.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
programme.desc: 'Murder In The Outback: The Falconio And Lees Mystery. S1/E2'. A look at how sole eyewitness Joanne Lees came under immense scrutiny and pressure from both the British and Australian press as they hounded her for an interview.

programme.title: Twisted Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Shotgun Killer'. In Columbia, South Carolina, a delusional young man is gunning down locals in cold blood with a 12-gauge shotgun. He leads detectives on a chase across state lines all the way to Texas.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Small Town Secrets'. Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Wisconsin to investigate an unsolved homicide. Their search uncovers a town's dark side, crimes against children and lies within a church.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Professor's End'. Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the strange death of a retired college professor in Tonya's home town, whose cremation was halted by an anonymous tip call, hinting at murder.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Holding Onto Hope'. Kelly and Johnny Bonds return to their home state of Texas to look into the disappearance of a young mother in 2000, whose family has never given up on her.

programme.title: Killer Cases

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Ties That Bind'. When a single mother's car is found abandoned on a lone stretch of highway in Illinois, detectives are forced to turn to forensic evidence to piece together the secrets of her disappearance.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake

programme.title: What's My Car Worth?
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Racing Across the Block'. Join Keith Martin and Bill Stephens in Fort Lauderdale at Auctions America for another episode of What's My Car Worth? A 1969 Copo Camaro joins a 1965 Corvette.

programme.title: Hot Roads - The World's Most...
programme.desc: 'Hot Roads - The World's Most Dangerous Roads. S1/E2 - The Nawabpur Road in Dhaka - Home to the Bumper Car'. In Bangladesh, the land with the highest density of population in the world, the daily struggle to survive is fought everywhere.

programme.title: The Silk Road

programme.title: The Silk Road

programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Carried Away, Monster in Charge'. Talent contest The Grr Factor is in town. Henry wants Daddo to demonstrate his juggling. Momma and Daddo leave Cobby to babysit and the power goes to his head.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Rain, Rain, You're Not a Pain/Runaway Summer'. Rain stops Henry going to the Monster Wave Park, so he comes up with a novel way to have a swim. Summer loses Momma's necklace so she runs away.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Huggsgiving Day/All That Pizazz'. Instead of getting cross with young cousin Harry, Henry lets him help put on a Huggsgiving show. Summer loses the bow she wears when she dances. Can Henry find it?

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Don't Bug Bill/ Super Marsh'. Bill runs off with Marsh when Mazu showcases the bugs. Marsh admires the four little dinos. They each have incredible talents that are like superpowers.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Early Baby'. Calypso guides the playgroup through a disagreement after Rusty interrupts Bluey's game.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - The Sleepover'. Bluey and Bingo's plans to stay up late are derailed when Muffin misses her nap.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E38 - Copycat'. Bluey's having fun copying Dad, but her game takes a turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - The Adventure'. Bluey and Chloe embark on a quest to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Backpackers'. Mum and Dad are going on an adventure with Bluey and Bingo as their backpacks!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Zoo'. Bingo causes chaos at Bluey's backyard zoo, when she sneaks into Daddy Gorilla's cage.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hubcap Heist/ Food Truck Fiasco'. The Firebuds must get a stolen painting back from a pair of wily kid-thieves. The Firebuds set out to find their missing friend, but Flash is in such a rush, he makes mistakes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super...
programme.desc: 'Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Adventure'. Professor Von Drake's machine turns the gang into superheroes, just as Power-Pants Pete and Megamort turn up with a shrink ray, determined to make everything miniature.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E105 - Ninja Power Up'. The PJ Masks defeat the Ninjas with ease and become over-confident in their powers. But Night Ninja's secretly plotting to acquire PJ powers for himself.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Merry Chickmas / Feed the Brrrrds'. The Chicken Squad tries to create the best holiday decorations in the neighborhood! A snowstorm frustrates the Squad's attempts to track down missing bird food.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - T-wrecks / Trick or Eek'. Coop referees a contest when Sweetie and Little Boo both want to dress as a T-Rex for Halloween. The Squad must help their critter friends track down a mischievous ghost.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E67 - Flat Pack'. As Mum and Dad put together their new flat pack patio swing-seat, Bluey and Bingo use the cardboard and bubble wrap to construct their own mini-civilization.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E66 - Queens'. Bingo and Bluey take turns being the Queen and her butler. When they both want to be butler, Mum gets crowned after Dad's short stint as a chaotic Queen.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E65 - Trains'. Bingo is the model citizen... commuting to work on the Dad-Train, dropping her daughter at day care and working as a vet. Bluey on the other hand is much more intent on having fun!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E64 - Sticky Gecko'. Bluey and Bingo won't leave for their playdate with Judo until a sticky rubber gecko falls down from the ceiling!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E63 - Hairdressers'. Hairdressers Bluey and Bingo discover that their customer Bert Handsome has nits!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E62 - Rug Island'. Bluey and Bingo are living on a desert island in the back garden when they discover Dad washed up on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E61 - Sleepytime'. As Mum finishes reading bedtime stories to Bingo and kisses her goodnight, Bingo tells Mum tomorrow morning she will be waking up in her own bed.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Daddy Dropoff'. It's Dad's turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school, but Bluey and Bingo are not going to make it easy to get there on time.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E59 - Favourite Thing'. The Heelers take turns remembering their favourite thing from the day at dinnertime, but when Bluey laughs at something her sister said earlier, Bingo's mood darkens.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E130 - Heroes of the Road Part Iii/ Heroes of the Road Part 4'. The PJMs can't wait to use their vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But they don't work well with Newton or their PJ Animals.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Snurfy Murphy/New Rock on the Block'. It's warm in Rocky Falls and it causes Murphy to 'snurf,' a hiccup-like habit unique to mammoths. Eureka volunteers to move a mysterious meteorite out of the town before sunset.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Magic Mansion'. Funny takes the friends somewhere they can have superpowers! Mickey's hero, Rocket Mouse, invites Mickey and friends to join his team of mouse-stronauts on a great adventure!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Hammerbarn'. Chilli and Bandit are keen to get a new pizza oven like their neighbours' so they all go on a trip to Hammerbarn.

programme.desc: 'S22/E54 of 61'. Assisting the youth of our country on various fronts is crucial to our future and The Drive for Excellence foundation does exactly that.

programme.title: G4D Tour '22 HL
programme.desc: Highlights. Watch the highs and lows across 2 days as the top 8 golfers in the World Rankings for Golfers with Disability battle it out to claim the ultimate prize in disabled golf.

programme.title: Sunshine HL '22 South African Open D4
programme.desc: 'Sunshine Tour Blitz Highlights - Investec South African Open Day 4'. From Blair Atholl Golf Estate - Lanseria, South Africa.

programme.title: Golf Feature
programme.desc: 'S22/E55 of 61'. The 2022 Altron Big Easy Tour final took place recently at Country Club Johannesburg. With Sunshine Tour cards on offer the field of professionals had i all to play for at the Rocklands course.

programme.title: Golf Feature
programme.desc: 'S22/E56 of 61'. The South African Disabled Golf Association recently held their annual Cape Town Open, which then was followed by a trip to Dubai to collect some golf balls all courtesy of the DP World Tour.

programme.title: Commitment Enhances Faith
programme.desc: 'Anyone who claims that he does not have to suffer, because Jesus did it for him, he is actually contradicting what Jesus said'.

programme.title: Nazareth Crusade Day 1
programme.desc: Aptly set, The Nazareth Meeting With TB Joshua Day 1 was held on the historic Mount Precipice, where Jesus once walked. A message centred on love freed hearts to receive the blessings that followed.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: Many Christians often wonder why their prayer and Christian activities seem to yield little or no result. Prophet T.B. Joshua reveals the secret of attracting the Spirit of God to our lives in the message, A Free Spirit.

programme.title: Live Sunday Service
programme.desc: Join Prophet TB Joshua in a time of powerful prayer, revealing prophecy and incredible deliverance during the Saturday Live Prophetic Service at The SCOAN. As you watch God's power at work, trust in Him that your life will improve.

programme.title: Live Sunday Service
programme.desc: Join Prophet TB Joshua in a time of powerful prayer, revealing prophecy and incredible deliverance during the Saturday Live Prophetic Service at The SCOAN. As you watch God's power at work, trust in Him that your life will improve.

programme.title: Nazareth Crusade Day 1
programme.desc: Aptly set, The Nazareth Meeting With TB Joshua Day 1 was held on the historic Mount Precipice, where Jesus once walked. A message centred on love freed hearts to receive the blessings that followed.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: Many Christians often wonder why their prayer and Christian activities seem to yield little or no result. Prophet T.B. Joshua reveals the secret of attracting the Spirit of God to our lives in the message, A Free Spirit.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Russia Snow Village
programme.desc: Those weathered by the hardships of life are in need at the Russia Snow Village. The Emmanuel TV team visits the charity to further assist with food and clothes to fuel and warm them through the winter season.

programme.title: Commitment Enhances Faith
programme.desc: 'Anyone who claims that he does not have to suffer, because Jesus did it for him, he is actually contradicting what Jesus said'.

programme.title: Everyone Has Been Tempted
programme.desc: As Christians, God never promised to keep us away from trials and temptation, but He promised to see us through. Learn some practical keys on how to overcome temptation in this enlightening message by TB Joshua.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Friends And Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - No Turning Back'. With Samuel imprisoned and Caleb injured, Macky, Portia and the gang devise a scheme to use storm rainwater to flood the palace jail, hoping to force the guards to open the jail doors.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: Another Ministry - USA Lockdown...
programme.desc: Another Ministry - USA Lockdown Outreach.The intense heat of the summer months heightened by the lockdown made AC units a real scarcity in less privileged communities across USA. Join the Emmanuel TV Team as they install new AC units.

programme.title: The Call Of God
programme.desc: A question brewing in the mind of so many is, how can I know what my calling from God is? Pay close attention as TB Joshua teaches the simple truth of how to recognise and fulfil our calling from God.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Extreme volcanologist adrenaline junkie Christopher Horsley, a volcano access specialist, photographer and expedition guide, sets out to explore the most active lava volcanoes on Planet Earth.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Martin explores the legendary Galapagos, getting up close to sealions, iguanas, tortoises, penguins, finches and baby sharks. He joins conservation expeditions, sees evolution in action and visits the site of a murder mystery.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alexander witnesses a volcanic eruption, visits the original geyser, learns about the Icelandic belief in elves, takes a trip to an unusual museum and meets an Icelandic rock band.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. A daring Swedish skier captures the horrifying moment he is buried alive by a tsunami of snow in Verbier, Switzerland. In California, blazing bushfires tear through communities.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - It's Not Just You'. We handpick a bunch of experiences that are common to human beings, no matter what age, lifestyle or cultural background they come from.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Australia'. Ben returns to a remote Australian island to find out how former businessman David Glasheen is getting on. For more than twenty years David enjoyed a life of peace but must survive by growing his own vegetables.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Wales'. Ben heads back to Utah, where he first met twin brothers Bill and Bob Stone, 3 years ago. He re-joins these canyon-dwelling renegades in their remote home, but this time, only one of them is living there.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Hungary'. Ben returns to the remote Hungarian countryside to revisit Julia Pryke and Gareth Shone who just 16 months ago gave up the 9 - 5 in the UK to live in a ramshackle farmhouse in a country they had never visited.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Texas'. Ben ventures back to the barren landscape of the Wild West to revisit one of his first ever wild men John Wells, a former fashion photographer who gave up the New York City high life for the scorching Texan desert.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E2'. Joanna continues her travels to Rome, a city like no other on earth. She zips into the city on the back of a Vespa to get her first glimpse of the beauty that awaits.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E1 of 2 - Havana'. Joanna kicks off her adventure in the back of a classic car in Havana, outlining her 1500-mile Caribbean adventure.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E2 of 2 - Haiti'. Before leaving Cuba, Joanna gets as close as possible to Guantanamo Bay, before taking a short boat trip to Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. On Zambia's plains, a cheetah mother must keep her precious cubs safe, preparing them for life without her.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. With the emergence of a young rival, a spotted hyena queen struggles to keep her grip on power - while also trying to raise a family - on Zambia's vast and unforgiving Liuwa Plain grasslands.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. High in the mountains of Morocco lives a descendant of a long line of macaque rulers who has been in charge of her troupe for many winters.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Boots'. Gregg Wallace visits a boot factory in Wollaston, Northamptonshire to follow the production of a pair of Dr. Martens, while Cherry Healey gets to grips with the machines that make shoelaces.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Istanbul
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. With only 15 days to complete their pilgrimage, the group begin their adventure in the capital of Serbia, Belgrade. From here, they make their way to Bulgaria.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Boots'. Gregg Wallace visits a boot factory in Wollaston, Northamptonshire to follow the production of a pair of Dr. Martens, while Cherry Healey gets to grips with the machines that make shoelaces.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Boots'. Gregg Wallace visits a boot factory in Wollaston, Northamptonshire to follow the production of a pair of Dr. Martens, while Cherry Healey gets to grips with the machines that make shoelaces.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Volcano expert Chris Horsley is still in Iceland to check out Katla, one of Europe's largest and most deadly volcanos, which is overdue an eruption.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E4 - Revive Our Oceans'. Prince William and Earthshot Prize Council members Sir David Attenborough and singer Shakira discover how we are damaging the oceans.

programme.title: Pilgrimage: The Road to Istanbul
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. With only 15 days to complete their pilgrimage, the group begin their adventure in the capital of Serbia, Belgrade. From here, they make their way to Bulgaria.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Your Health and More'. One could be mildly interested in the topic of health or a bracketed health conscious cookie. It has a bouquet of stories that are current and relevant, curated to pique interest.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. This episode looks at the impact of wildfires and the deadly infernos they cause. Wildfires show no signs of stopping and their inexorability on this planet is truly terrifying.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. This episode looks at droughts. It is not only a lack of rain and high temperatures that causes drought, overuse of existing water supplies by an ever-increasing population only adds to the problem.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E2 of 2 - Haiti'. Before leaving Cuba, Joanna gets as close as possible to Guantanamo Bay, before taking a short boat trip to Haiti.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Utah'. Ben Fogle meets two brothers who live in the wilds of Utah.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - The Big Catch'. Ricko DeWilde teaches his children to survive in the wild as they journey to Huslia. Sue Aikens updates her camp to improve her comfort.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Socorro'. Steve Backshall is in Mexico exploring the Eastern Pacific and the Ravillagigedo Archipelago to find ways to protect the local shark population.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Bad Bones'. Jessie Holmes must build a bridge to gain access to the land beyond his home. Sue Aikens makes critical updates to the facilities in Kavik.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Expedition Unseen'. Steve takes on four entirely new adventures to remote parts of the planet - including Saudi Arabia, Gabon and Mexico - in search of precious natural wonders.

programme.title: Animals with Cameras
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Oceans'. Wildlife cameraman, Gordon Buchanan leads a team using specially designed on board cameras to film ground-breaking new behaviour in some of the animals who depend on our oceans.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. High in the mountains of Morocco lives a descendant of a long line of macaque rulers who has been in charge of her troupe for many winters.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Ford Class Aircraft Carrier'. In this episode we learn about the construction of the cutting-edge Ford class aircraft carriers, the largest warships ever built - almost as long as the Empire State Building is tall.

programme.title: Patrick Ayree's Wild World
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Biologist Patrick Aryee continues on his breathtaking global road trip. Along the way, he explores how seemingly small disruptions to ecosystems can have far-reaching implications for the species involved.

programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E4 - Revive Our Oceans'. Prince William and Earthshot Prize Council members Sir David Attenborough and singer Shakira discover how we are damaging the oceans.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - New Zealand'. Ben returns to New Zealand to catch up with the Long family, who live a hunter-gatherer existence on the country's South Island in an area that is two days hike from the nearest road.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Wonderland Hotel'. Shanghai is renowned for some of the world's most cutting edge architecture. The InterContinental Shanghai Wonderland burrows 16 stories below ground level.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Pantry Faves'. Molly Yeh uses pantry ingredients in a budget lunch. She makes harissa-braised chickpeas with feta, yogurt marinated chicken skewers and peanut butter rice squares.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Big Game'. Molly Yeh makes a pre-game lunch for friends, and it's full of delicious finger foods! She serves her Asian Scotch eggs and crispy oven fries with feta red pepper dip.

programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Asheville'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. This includes tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, and succulent rainbow trout.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lost UFO Files'. The team recovers physicist James McDonald's long-lost research. Over 20 years, he interviewed more than 500 witnesses of UFOs and unearthed a number of revealing government documents.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E17 - Busted Beemer'. A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - Call The Count'. When a 1960's Pak Trak hunting scooter lands at the shop, Rick calls Danny 'The Count' to check out the unique dirt mobile.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E28 - Auctions Away!'. The town of Palm Springs has the buyers chasing treasure across the Southern California desert. Mary tries to get a locker, while Darrell is after the ultimate score.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E29 - Downtown Showdown'. An auction in LA brings more buyers than Dan and Laura bargained for. Ivy tries to keep the peace, but gets dragged into an auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 of 30 - Santanas Are Coming To Town'. Recently separated, Brandi and Jarrod find themselves at the same auction, and tensions flare. So much so that she gets the Laura treatment, and he regresses to his childhood self.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E1 of 30 - Bits And Pizzas'. Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 of 30'. Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E10 of 30'. Kenny tries to reclaim the title of 'King of Whittier', Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes. Lisa graduates to full-fledged buyer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E10 - The Pawntridge Family'. Prepare to dive with the Pawn Stars as the guys check out a first edition copy of 20,000 Leagues Under The Sea. One of the rarest first editions, can they navigate this monster deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E11 - A Hard Day's Pawn'. The Pawn Stars check out a collection of memorabilia signed by all four of The Beatles. With a guitar autographed by Paul McCartney, can they come together on a price or will they let it be?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E12 - Fool's Gold'. Prepare for liftoff with the Pawn Stars as the guys check out a toilet seat from the NASA Space Shuttle program. Will this deal leave them flush with cash?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E13 - World Series Of Pawn'. The guys look at a Los Angeles Dodgers World Series Pennant signed by Frank Sinatra. Will the connection to ol' blue eyes send the price to the moon?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E14 - Rage Against That Machine'. The Pawn Stars check out a pair of rifles with double rotating barrels. Designed to give 19th century hunters a second chance, will Rick fire up a quick offer?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - Planes And Flames'. Rick is contacted by Nellis Air Force Base to restore their replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack to restore the fighter?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E19 - Nut Job'. A client's expectations are sky high when he agrees to a $10 000 restoration of his early 1900s peanut roaster. Ron and Tyler go digging for gold in a picker's backyard that is loaded with antique gas pumps.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - Call The Count'. When a 1960's Pak Trak hunting scooter lands at the shop, Rick calls Danny 'The Count' to check out the unique dirt mobile.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - UFO Emergency'. Investigation into a huge pulsating light spotted in the sky near Ohio in 1994. A radar operator describes what he saw, explaining he had 'never seen anything move so fast'.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - First Contact'. Experts investigate the alleged crash of an alien craft in Texas in 1897, debris of which was reportedly thrown down a well while an alien body was buried in a local graveyard.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Real Roswell'. The story of a spacecraft crashing in Roswell, New Mexico, is the most famous case in UFO history. Now, a theory has emerged that there was more than one crash site.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Arizona Lights'. On March 13, 1997, a string of fiery globes were seen over Arizona, but earlier that night some eyewitnesses saw something even more shocking - a huge boomerang-shaped object.

programme.title: Legends Of The Pharaohs
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Birth Of The Tutankhamun Dynasty'. Based on the most recent research, the series captures the energy and immediacy of a living world, and the drama and splendour of this fascinating ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Bible Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Lost in Translation'. The Bible is one of the most influential books ever written. But through translations and censorship, has its truth been compromised?

programme.title: Bible Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Promised Land'. Considered the most sacred place on Earth and fought over for thousands of years, was the area known as 'The Promised Land' really given by God to a 'chosen people?'

programme.title: 39-45: The Channel's Superguns
programme.desc: The English Channel during WWII was a strategic passageway separating two major enemies: Great Britain and Germany. Whoever controlled the Channel controlled the passage of warships and commercial vessels.

programme.title: The Battle Of Midway
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. By attacking Midway atoll, the Japanese hoped to lure the US Pacific Fleet into the open sea. Instead, the attack marked the destruction of the Japanese Fleet and the end of Tokyo's supremacy in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Rouen To Hiroshima
programme.desc: On 6 August 1945, the B-29 Superfortress, Enola Gay, dropped the first atomic bomb over Hiroshima. A documentary tells the story of the bombing campaign that transformed the face of war, from Rouen to Hiroshima.

programme.title: Rouen To Hiroshima
programme.desc: On 6 August 1945, the B-29 Superfortress, Enola Gay, dropped the first atomic bomb over Hiroshima. A documentary tells the story of the bombing campaign that transformed the face of war, from Rouen to Hiroshima.

programme.title: The Fall Of France
programme.desc: Hitler attacks west invading Belgium and Holland, Operation Dynamo and the attempt to evacuate the British expeditionary force at Dunkirk culminating in the Fall Of France.

programme.title: 22 June 1940: The Sound Of Surrender
programme.desc: The Armistice of 22 June 1940 like you've never heard before. We revisit how France ended up in a critical situation with the discovery of negotiations for Hitler's humiliating victory over the French Third Republic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3448 of 171'. Doreen kom verf gou Joe se gesig. Hoekom wil sy altyd hê wat sy nie kan kry nie, sug Louwna. Noudat sy Rex verloor het, besef sy sy het hom lief. En Braam het 'n verrassing vir Krynauw...

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3449 of 171'. Noudat Nenna se elektrisiën hul kragprobleme opgelos het, is Jamie suur daaroor. Jane is ontsteld dat Darius nie vir die naweek mag huis toe kom nie, maar hy voel nie so hartseer nie...

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3450 of 171'. Doreen kry Joe in sy woonwa oorkant die straat jammer en uiteindelik gee Candy hom warm pap en 'n waarskuwing: Vanmiddag moet jy weg wees. Jane kry snuf in die neus oor Darius...

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3451 of 171'. Joe is die ongenooide gas uit die hel. Hy stort urelank Krynauw se badkamer, eet die koelkas leeg en dra Braam se duur kamerjas... Jane vra Darius reguit: Kul jy my met 'n ander vrou?

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Nataniël. Erik. Wolf.

programme.title: Kwêla

programme.title: Oppiestoep

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 14'. Almal haal 'n private vlug na Renske en Heinrich se wildsplaas waar 'n kompetisie wag wat nie almal by die reëls laat hou nie. Mel en Kiki vat Marié aan oor 'n kontroversiële video van haar.

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 of 26'. Coco verdwyn vir die nag en almal moet die volgende oggend ligloop toe sy by die huis kom. Poena hoor sy internet liedjies is verwyder. Elton het nuus vir Poena oor sy musiek kanaal.

programme.title: Hier Gaan Ons Alweer
programme.desc: 'S21/E10 of 13'. Die strandlopers vang 'n mooi mosselkraker en die meermanne slaan terug met groot kabeljoue van die boot af. Later gaan soek die strandlopers nog groter vis en word hulle katrolle gestroop.

programme.title: Wanderlus

programme.desc: What began as a mission to stop her husband's wandering eye turns into a journey of self-discovery for a woman in a polygamous marriage.

programme.title: Kumnyama

programme.title: Ibutho

programme.title: Nkosazane

programme.title: Khumba

programme.title: Izintombi Zodwa
programme.desc: A conservative girl is the leader of a group of girls who vowed to stay celibate and focus on their school work. Things change when she falls in love with a boy.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed

programme.title: House Party 3

programme.title: Ray

programme.title: Dreambuilders

programme.title: Status Update
programme.desc: A fun-loving teen rom-com. When his parents separate, a teenager is forced to move to a new town where his life is changed by a magical app that makes his status updates come true.

programme.title: The House With A Clock In Its Walls
A.R.C.H.I.E 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite robodog returns for another adventure. This time Archie meets the son of a carnival owner, together they must stop someone from stealing the carnival.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion Of The Cimarron
programme.desc: This Oscar nominee for Best Animated Feature film sees a young mustang stallion become the leader of his herd. But when he is captured, he's forced to fight for his freedom.

programme.title: The Son Of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A delightful animated adventure. A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father - only to discover that he's Bigfoot.

programme.title: Tooth Fairy

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Action star Dolph Lundgren stars and directs this action film. Three desperate parties seek out millions of dollars hidden inside a building that's scheduled to be demolished.

programme.title: Battle Drone

programme.title: I Am Vengeance

programme.title: Stage Mother
programme.desc: A music-filled dramedy Jacki Weaver, Lucy Liu and Adrian Grenier. A conservative church choir director inherits her late son's San Francisco drag club.

programme.title: Ordinary Love
programme.desc: Lesley Manville and Liam Neeson lead this heart-rending drama. The long, healthy teasing marriage of a middle-aged couple is tested as they face life-threatening cancer.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: Dakota Fanning and Toni Collette star in this touching film. A young autistic woman runs away from her caregiver to submit her manuscript to 'Star Trek' writing competition.

programme.title: Treasure Hound
programme.desc: A great canine film. A boy moves into his late grandpa's house and inherits his dog (who happens to talk). They band together to find his grandpa's priceless lost Spanish treasure.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse Of The Midas Box
programme.desc: Mystery and adventure fill this movie about a young man who must save his brother and the world from a powerful magical box.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in this disaster film. A expert discovers unusual volcanic activity near a small town. Unfortunately the townspeople don't take his results seriously.

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: A man in a yellow hat heads to Africa to find a mysterious idol. He accidentally brings back a playful monkey instead.

programme.title: Beethoven

programme.title: Bigfoot Family
programme.desc: A fun animated sequel. Father uses his new fame to fight an Alaskan oil company but when he disappears, his family, a raccoon and a bear go to rescue him.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: Amy Schumer brings the laughs in this rowdy comedy. A woman with self-esteem issues suffers a concussion and wakes up believing that she's the most beautiful woman on the planet.

programme.title: Big Nate
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Belles A Ringin''. While buying romance novels for Ellen, Nate discovers they are cash cows. Under a pen name, he writes a best-selling graphic novel using his life as inspiration.

programme.title: Danger Force

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Exit Stage Theft'. Max tries to reestablish his evil cred with petty crimes, but when his best friends become a target, he must choose between his them and his reputation.

programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Norse-ing Around/Janitor's Apprentice'. Fanboy and Chum Chum discover a frozen Viking in their icebox, The team must help Janitor Poopatine clean up the school.

programme.title: Rusty Rivets
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Rusty Feels Peachy, Rusty's Monkey Mayhem'. Rusty and Ruby must find a way to get Chef Betty and Sammy working together, Ruby tries to help the monkeys at the Animal Park come up with some new performances.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Pulverizer Returns!'. When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - Whale Watching/Krusty Kleaners'. Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, and after spilling a milkshake during a delivery, SpongeBob vows to return and clean the entire building!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E4 - Patnocchio/ChefBob'. Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty - later, Mr Krabs puts in an open kitchen and SpongeBob gets stage fright.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E6 - Call The Cops!/Surf N' Turf'. Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! Later, Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a contest, so SpongeBob calls in help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11 - High Sea Diving/Bottle Burglars'. SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean! WSpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E47 - Simon Saves The World'. Simon's new invention threatens to destroy the world, creating a time loop and changing gravity inside the house.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E25 - Geizmo's Day Out'. When Alvin kidnaps Simon's robot Geizmo, he gets a lesson in parenting a child going through their terrible twos.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Darker Parker/Lady Of The Tree'. Parker makes snowcones for everybody and learns that saying 'no' isn't always a bad thing, Parker and Angus make a delivery to a spooky old woman in Middlemost Forest.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Sleepover/The 'B' Word'. Parker has his first sleepover and enlists Angus's help to make it fun, Parker and Angus try and give Russell a bath before her stench becomes destructive.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Hide And Seek'. George isn't very good at hide and seek until Daddy Pig helps him to find somewhere to hide.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Daddy Loses his Glasses'. When Daddy Pig loses his glasses he gets a bit grumpy. But Peppa and George have lots of fun looking for them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Gardening'. Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Bicycles'. Daddy Pig teaches Peppa to ride her bicycle without stabilisers - just like her friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Secrets'. Mummy Pig gives Peppa a special box to keep secret things in.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Pups And The Beanstalk'. Rubble decides to nap under a tree at Farmer Yumi's when Adventure Bay gets a huge problem - Alex the Giant! Later, Cap'n Turbot needs to get a picture of a rare bird.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Race For The Golden Treasure'. Blaze and Pegwheel the Pirate have teamed up for a treasure hunt! Together they must find three keys to unlock a chest. But Crusher's sailing the high seas too.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Tour Bus'. When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a dangerous game show.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Alvin Management'. When Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much a therapist moves in to help Dave control his anger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5 - Banned In Bikini Bottom / Stanely S. Squarepants'. Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom, When Stanley, SpongeBob's klutzy cousin, visits Bikini Bottom, he quickly turns SpongeBob's life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Krabby Road'. Squidward sees Squilliam on a TV show about fancy homes and tries to outdo him - later, SpongeBob mistakenly thinks that Plankton is starting a band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Penny Foolish/Nautical Novice'. Mr Krabs sees SpongeBob pick something up off the street and gets the idea that SpongeBob found a penny. Later, SpongeBob's boating school class is on a field trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S12/E2 - Mind The Gap/Dirty Bubble Returns'. Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, causing an unexpected change in his demeanor, The newly reformed 'Clean Bubble' takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S12/E3 - The Nitwitting/The Ballad Of Filthy Muck'. Squidward leaves after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel, SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Guess Who's Shopping For Dinner?'. Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task, When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: Lego City Adventures
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Quantifying Intrepidness / Green Light'. Maddy becomes intrepid reporter, Nomi D. Plume and uses her anonymity to break exclusive scoops to save the paper, Fendrich tries to steal a high-tech Eco-Power device.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Ariel Force One/Itsy Bitsy'. A hot air balloonist crash lands into the Steadfast, When Parker shelters a spider during a blizzard, the cloud learns of Angus's spider fear.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Return Of Thornbergaupht / Squashed'. Simon's interactive video game is about to take off, until Jeanette reprograms the game's villain.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Squashed'. When Alvin dreams of joining a private club, he volunteers Dave to play squash, even though Dave doesn't play.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Writer's Block'. When Dave suffers from writer's block, Alvin pretends to write a broadway show, which only makes Dave feel worse.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Jinxed!'. After Theodore sees Alvin accidentally ruin Dave's computer, Alvin jinxes Theodore so he won't be able to tell on him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E6 - Chatterbox Gary/Don't Feed The Clowns'. Gary has a pet translation collar and is talking up a storm, and when a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E7 - SpongeBob Square Pants Zulu'. A prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen and causes chaos all over town!/ When a flock of clams descend, SpongeBob has to get them out before they ruin the whole town!

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Squawk In the Name Of Love/Date With Destiny'. Sergio enlists Adelaide's help to become a gentleman in order to win Priscilla back, Rosa hears an Ernesto Estrella prediction that Maria and Arturo could reunite..

programme.title: Horrid Henry
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Horrid Henry And The Hideo Video'. Horrid Henry and the Hideo Video: Henry's career as a film director gets off to a shaky start!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5 - Banned In Bikini Bottom / Stanely S. Squarepants'. Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom, When Stanley, SpongeBob's klutzy cousin, visits Bikini Bottom, he quickly turns SpongeBob's life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5/E99 - The Two Faces Of Squidward/Spongehenge'. A very windy day in Bikini Bottom is blowing air through SpongeBob's holes resulting in a chorus of pertty flute-like sounds.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Cloud Of The Month / A. Plumber'. After receiving the 'Cloud of the Month' award, Parker gets a big head, After clogging the toilet, Parker calls a plumber - who winds up being Ryan in disguise.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Snack Pact/The Horror-Scope'. The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and try to keep it a secret from Abuela, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe that 'love will find her,' until it seems to come true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Arr In The Family/Finders Weepers'. Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Ronnie and Sid have to decide whether they 'borrow' money from a lost coin purse they found.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Unhappy Campers/Leprechauns 2'. Never having made it to dark, the Middlemost Post decide their latest camping trip will finally be the one. Bud and Buddy return to the mountain.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Sporty Parker/Hammy Time'. Parker makes the Yellow Springs soccer team, which thrills Angus since he never had the chance to play growing up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S3/E59 - The SpongeBob SquarePants Lost Episodes'. SpongeBob is jellyfishing when he wistfully realizes that he wants to fly, Patchy the Pirate is set to present a never before seen episode of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S3/E60 - Spongebob Meets the Strangler/Pranks Alot'. SpongeBob catches someone littering and turns him in - but it's the Tattletale Strangler!/ SpongeBob and Patrick invest in magic 'invisible spray' at the prank shop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S4/E62 - The Lost Mattress/Krabs vs Plankton'. Plankton slips and falls on some water at the Krusty Krab and sues Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress to help him sleep better.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends Of Awesomeness
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Has-Been Hero'. Has-been Hero: Po's kung fu hero comes to town for an exhibition match. But the hero is all washed up and asks Po to throw a fight to make him famous again. (S1, ep 26)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends Of Awesomeness
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Kung Fu Day Care'. Tigress is forced to babysit a small child who has been separated from his parents.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E22'. Alex & Co argue while writing their new song, Sam learns Rebecca has a lovely voice but doesn't want to upset Linda. He forgets his six month anniversary with Nicole.

programme.title: Alex And Co

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Normal'. Tara has saved her family from extinction. Esmerelda is getting closer to working out the Supreme Everine's identity. Tara tries to throw her off the scent but it goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. The teens are contacted by the record producer who wants to sign them to a contract as long as they exclude Sam from the group as he's not cool enough. The gang doesn't know what to do.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Poof Went the Weasel'. Binny accidentally causes an explosion and the school has to be evacuated. While this is happening, someone steals the donations box. Binny and Melchior have to find out who the real thief is!

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Madame Boo'. Binny and Melchior visit his only living cousin Albert who lives in a senior citizen's home. Shortly after they learn that the pocket watch has opened up the door to the spirit world for Binny.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Drifty'. Tara is reunited with Fuggy, her old teddy bear. Fuggy could always get Tara to sleep as a baby, but now he has been mended with golden thread his lullaby sends you to sleep forever!

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E24'. Alex has a difficult decision to make regarding the band. Meanwhile relationships become even more complicated.

programme.title: Violetta
programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. Ludmila tries to convince Tomas that Violetta is now with Leon. Luca is holding music nights at the resto bar, and Leon asks Violetta to sing with him there. Tomas sees their performance.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Crash and Cash'. Binny and Melchior do not believe that Mark's scooter is totaled and head over to the body shop where they make an interesting discovery..

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - The Second Temple/Barrel's Warhammer'. Anne and Marcy's quest to get home takes them to an icy mountain temple, but they'll need help to find it. Sasha and Grime go on a quest to retrieve a legendary Warhammer.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Bessie & Microangelo/The Third Temple'. Bessie has her work cut out for her when she's tasked with showing MicroAngelo the ropes. Anne and Marcy need help from an old friend to find the final key to returning home.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - Wild Rehearsal'. Mal's evil ways cause chaos as Audrey, Jane and the rest of the girls rehearse for the big Jewel-bilee song performance. Evie confronts her BFF.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - The Golden Spear!'. As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della's planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald's nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!'. Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one of which she might not be able to fight her way out.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Hiya Henry/People Watching'. Cricket Green's family moves from the country to Big City. As they acclimatize, their perspectives on differences between country and city are revealed in an entertaining way.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Hurty Tooth, Sleepover Sisters'. Cricket tries to avoid the dentist, while Bill struggles with a puzzle in the waiting room. Tilly and Andromeda have a sleepover and try to stay up all night

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Valentine's Dance, Green Streets'. At the Valentine's Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella! Cricket joins forces with Officer Keys to hunt down a neighborhood litterbug.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Park Pandemonium, Cricket's Biscuits'. Gramma spurns Tilly, so Tilly tries making her jealous. Gramma makes biscuits for the kids when they're hurt, but not when they're better.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Violet Behind the Ultra, the'. An overshadowed 13-year-old girl, finally gets to shine when a magical luchador mask bestows her with superpowers akin to those of the city's resident superhero, Black Scorpion.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Sleepover Showdown'. At the girls' first sleepover, Violet tries to fit in with Maya and her new friends with a little help from her mask.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E74 - Cat Blanc'. When Marinette makes a serious mistake, she has to face the consequences by fighting the last person she ever imagined would get akumatized.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E75 - Felix'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E76 - Ladybug'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E77 - The Battle of the Miraculous - Part One: Loveater'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face the Bourgeois couple. Now Hearthunter, a Cerberus with two heads, they devour all the love in Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Pair of Sneakers'. Mal and Freddie sneak back onto the Isle of the Lost in hopes of finding Mal's missing Jewel-bilee gem. Freddie gives Mal a gift.

programme.title: Descendants
programme.desc: Modern-day coming-of-age adventure about the teenage sons and daughters of Disney's most infamous villains fuses castles with classrooms to create a contemporary, music-driven story.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - Me and Mr Jonas and Mr Jonas and Mr Jonas'. American teen heartthrobs The Jonas Brothers star in this episode. Miley gets jealous when her Dad jams with them. Jackson tries to break the world pogo stick record.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - I Will Always Loathe You'. Miley's in the running for an award so Grandma comes to stay. Aunt Dolly comes too and the two women don't get on. Rico has a great idea for a public access commercial.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E78 - Say Yes to the Protest'. Nia wants to take part in a downtown protest but Raven is set against it, mainly due to the unpredictable nature of protests and potentially dangerous situations.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E80 - So You Think You Can Drive?'. It's time for the kids to get their learner's permits and they ask Raven to teach them how to drive!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Long Time Gone'. Griffin and Harper sneak back through the portal to find a search party looking for Savannah. Police officers begin questioning and zero in on Griffin and Harper!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - If I Could Turn Back Time'. Griffin and Harper realize that Savannah could have found the portal and travelled back in time too. Together, they go back in time another 30 years to 1960!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Savannah's ghost uses the old radio in the hidden room to reach out to Griffin and Harper.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Night of the Stench'. It's the Night of the Stench, when the bog turns against the village. Tara asks the tapestry what her future holds, and is horrified when it predicts Cameron's doom.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Art Thief'. Binny's school class takes a field trip to the museum. Suddenly, a security alarm sounds: the valuable Czar jewels have disappeared. Binny and Melchior start investigating...

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E26'. Nicole feels guilty for David's expulsion and decides to try to have him readmitted. She sets up a protest involving the whole school and Victoria finally agrees to let him come back.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E27'. Sam confronts Rebecca with the song of The Lindas. Rebecca is shocked and convinced Sam that she knew nothing about it.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Tallulah Brinkworth Meets Her Match'. Tara hatches a plan to pull her magical self out of the tapestry to help defeat Bridget. Instead she pulls out Tallulah Brinkworth, her fictional alter-ego.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Forevermoor'. Tara wakes up in Bridget's dream-like version of Evermoor. She and the whole village are under Bridget's spell. Can Otto wake Tara up so she can destroy Bridget's kingdom?

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Nicole beats Linda and is elected school body president. When Christian and Nicole pretend to be going together to mislead Linda, Alex realizes he's jealous.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Dog and his Boy'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Team Spirit'. Binny and Melchior meet the ghost soccer star Mats, who was involved in a betting scandal, which destroyed his reputation. Binny and Melchior decide to take the case...

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Day of Hearts'. Two of the three Founders have now taken villagers as hosts but Tara smashed the lantern before the third Founder could be released. So the Founders plot their revenge on her.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Labours of Bella'. Tara has a terrible admission to make to Cameron. Bella learns the cost of lying when Esmerelda makes her take an exam to prove her right to the title Supreme Everine.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E28'. After pondering a record executive's offer of a solo album, Alex decides to refuse it and go on with Alex & Co., but fellow band members are angry they didn't know about it.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E29'. Alex realises that if he signs a solo deal he won't see his friends any more. What will he decide to do?

programme.title: Violetta
programme.desc: 'S1/E20'. Violetta suspects that Angie likes Herman. She tries to ignore Tomas and pretends her friendship with Francesca is more important. Luca is thrilled with the success of his music nights.

programme.title: Rolling With The Ronks
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Stealing the Show'. When a swindler comes to the village and steals the villagers' possessions, Flash and Mormagnon work together to uncover the swindler's iniquities.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Escape To/From Atlantis! Part 2'. Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads them all into trouble. Donald struggles to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - The Dinner/Battle of the Bands'. Anne and the Plantars invite some old adversaries over for dinner to try to bury the hatchet. Anne and her friends team up to enter the Wartwood Battle of the Bands contest.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E84 - Furious Fu'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face someone they know well...and never imagined they would have to fight someday.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E82'. Mr. Ramier gets akumatized into Mr. Pigeon for the 72nd time, and now, he can turn people into evil pigeons!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E83 - Psycomedian'. A famous comedian gets akumatized into Psycomedian. Able to impose any emotions on anyone, he wants to wipe the smiles off everyone's faces.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Green Christmas'. On Christmas Eve, Tilly helps Cricket redeem his year's worth of bad deeds for one last chance to get on Santa's nice list. Meanwhile Gramma and Nancy look for a present for Bill.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Elevator Action, Bad Influencer'. Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls for a huckster internet influencer, and Tilly makes an online video with Bill.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E85 - Sole Crusher'. A newcomer to Marinette's circle of friends gets akumatized into Sole Crusher, a giant supervillain who can absorb people. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir be up to the task?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E86 - Queen Banana'. When Chloe gets akumatized into Queen Banana, Ladybug decides to entrust a Miraculous to a new and promising ally to help her stop the supervillain.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E87 - Gabriel Agreste'. The adventure in Paris continues for Ladybug and Cat Noir, surrounded by new allies and fighting an ever more powerful and determined opponent.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E81 - Wrong Victor, the'. When Raven's father, Victor, has a health scare, Raven and Booker return to San Francisco to help. Booker fails to babysit his cousin and must fix things before Raven finds out.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Out of House and Home / Home Is Where the Haunt Is'. The McGees make fast cash. Molly pretends all is ok.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Finding Another Dimension'. As our villain family learns how to blend into their new town, things get complicated with their neighbor, Hartley, when Amy & Jake get their hands on their dad's evil invention.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend of the Twelve Masks, the'. When Violet discovers that there are 12 super-lucha masks, she begins to suspect that the secret to her Tiago's success is that he has a mask of his own.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Bye Bye Ball'. Jackson has damaged Miley's childhood teddy bear, so she plots her revenge. She wrecks his autographed baseball, but then has to try to get a replacement.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E85 - Sole Crusher'. A newcomer to Marinette's circle of friends gets akumatized into Sole Crusher, a giant supervillain who can absorb people. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir be up to the task?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E86 - Queen Banana'. When Chloe gets akumatized into Queen Banana, Ladybug decides to entrust a Miraculous to a new and promising ally to help her stop the supervillain.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E87 - Gabriel Agreste'. The adventure in Paris continues for Ladybug and Cat Noir, surrounded by new allies and fighting an ever more powerful and determined opponent.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Bye Bye Ball'. Jackson has damaged Miley's childhood teddy bear, so she plots her revenge. She wrecks his autographed baseball, but then has to try to get a replacement.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - Tilly Style / I, Farmbot'. Tilly searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Speed Trapped'. While trying to stop the Lab Rats taking a spin in Davenport's new self-driving car, Leo is trapped inside it by Marcus and sent on a high speed ride to the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Night of the Stench'. It's the Night of the Stench, when the bog turns against the village. Tara asks the tapestry what her future holds, and is horrified when it predicts Cameron's doom.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: Chan (Jackie Chan) is a Hong Kong policeman who single handedly arrests crime lord Chu Tao. Chu Tao seeks revenge and frames Chan with the murder of a corrupt cop.

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: A graffiti artist living on the streets is recruited by a slippery handler who has assembled a group of thieves to perform a series of art thefts.

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: Nick O'Bannon's premonition of a deadly car race spares his life and those of a few lucky others around him. But Death won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Driven
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in this high-octane racing film that follows the rivalry of two top race car drivers.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: If you're looking for a political action-thriller with heart then catch Channing Tatum as a cop having to save his daughter and the president when the White House is attacked.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer

programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug zar.

programme.title: Supercop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug zar.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this crime mystery about a heist gone awry. As he was out cold, a man sets to find out what happened in the ten minutes that led to his brother's death.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A young man (Bruce Lee) sworn to an oath of non-violence breaks it after his master is murdered and he discovers the factory he works in is a front for drug-smuggling.

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: Nick Marshall was the ultimate man's man until one night, in the privacy of his Rat Pack dream apartment, his eyes and ears opened more than he could have imagined or ever dreamed of.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan are back but the game has changed. They have to return to the dangerous world to rescue one of their own.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A groom and his groomsmen manage to lose his future brother-in-law while in Thailand for the wedding. To find him, they have to piece together what they did the previous night.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Michael Fassbender stars as the popular video game protagonist in this action-packed fantasy. A man is transported into the past of his ancestor who was a master assassin.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Denzel Washington find themselves in way over their heads in this action-packed shoot 'em up. They must find a way to work together in order to survive.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: While tracking down a tycoon's runaway daughter, private detective Ryo Saeba (Jackie Chan) finds himself on a luxury cruise ship commandeered by terrorists.

programme.title: Pound Of Flesh
programme.desc: A man's organs are stolen when he donates them to his dying niece. With the clock ticking for his niece, he carves a blood-soaked path through the city.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fairies Wear Boots'. Jack shows Ozzy and Sharon footage that leaves them questioning the existence of fairies and lizard people. Plus, the family debate whether ghosts can do math.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Chupacabra'. Experts analyse new evidence that could prove the legendary bloodsucking beast known as Chupacabra is real, and that there are two versions of the creature!

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Skull Of Doom And Dracula'. Don Wildman investigates a UFO crash in the heart of the Wild West. Plus, he reveals the true story behind the world's most notorious vampire.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Lady Godiva'. Don Wildman treks to the UK to visit a statue honouring bare-cheeked bravery. He also visits a Brooklyn cemetery to investigate the death of a psychic.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - The Breakup'. The spring breakup is starting to occur and the snow is melting. Meanwhile, Neil aims to start construction on the renovation of the mine.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Alien Flight Plan'. A bush pilot witnesses unsettling UFO activity. A former government operative reveals top-secret coordinates to an alleged alien base.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extra-terrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Mother Ship'. UFOs circle a larger, egg-shaped mother ship floating high above Anchorage.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Code Wars'. American code breakers have given them an edge in many conflicts. Now, code breakers work in the murky world of cyberspace to stop terrorists before they can strike.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Civil War'. Throughout the American civil war, victory on the battlefield was often decided not by strategy and bravery alone, but also by secret information coming from the shadows.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Cursed Mummy Tribe'. Deep in the Peruvian jungle, dozens of mummies have been found in cliffside tombs. Archaeologist Ramy Romany searches for evidence of who these people were.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Human Sacrifice In The Sky'. The mummies of three Incan children are discovered in the Andes at a notorious UFO hotspot. Ramy examines why they trekked 1,000 miles to their death.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Stolen Fortune Of The Pirate Mummy'. A mummy recovered at the bottom of the Atlantic has led treasure hunters to $120 million in gold and jewels stolen by infamous pirate Black Sam.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Legend Of The Crystal Skull'. Josh Gates takes on Central America's jungles to investigate the crystal skull discovered by an adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Atlantis Of The Andes'. Josh Gates dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. Josh discovers ruins from the ancient Tiwanaku people hidden in the lake's depths.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Lost Gold Of Scotland'. Josh Gates heads to the Scottish Highlands. His search focuses on a huge gold reserve hidden after the Jacobite uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E4'. Josh searches a precious statuette that has been lost for 25 years, the Golden Owl. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues to where it might be hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Ghost Ship Of The Great Lakes'. Josh tackles the maritime mystery of the Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. Josh uses a state-of-the-art submersible in the search.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Party With The Animals'. The Osbournes are baffled by clips of a ghostly pooch, a doughnut-shaped UFO, a Bigfoot encounter on Christmas and some demonic digging.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Ozark Howler'. Recently disclosed audio recordings and astonishing photographs may provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Bigfoot Island'. Is a Sasquatch colony terrorising the residents of a remote island? And, could decades of UFO sightings suggest that aliens are working with the US military?
